title: Java Operators
content:
### Operators in Java

Operators are special symbols that perform operations on variables and values.

---

### Arithmetic Operators

| Operator | Name | Example |
|----------|------|---------|
| `+` | Addition | `a + b` |
| `-` | Subtraction | `a - b` |
| `*` | Multiplication | `a * b` |
| `/` | Division | `a / b` |
| `%` | Modulus | `a % b` |
| `++` | Increment | `a++` |
| `--` | Decrement | `a--` |

---

### Comparison Operators

| Operator | Name |
|----------|------|
| `==` | Equal to |
| `!=` | Not equal |
| `>` | Greater than |
| `<` | Less than |
| `>=` | Greater or equal |
| `<=` | Less or equal |

---

### Logical Operators

| Operator | Name | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `&&` | AND | Both true |
| `||` | OR | At least one true |
| `!` | NOT | Inverts boolean |

---

### Assignment Operators

| Operator | Example | Equivalent |
|----------|---------|------------|
| `=` | `x = 5` | `x = 5` |
| `+=` | `x += 3` | `x = x + 3` |
| `-=` | `x -= 3` | `x = x - 3` |
| `*=` | `x *= 3` | `x = x * 3` |
| `/=` | `x /= 3` | `x = x / 3` |
| `%=` | `x %= 3` | `x = x % 3` |

> **Key Point:** `==` compares primitives by value but objects by reference. Use `equals()` for object value comparison. `&&` and `||` use short-circuit evaluation.

quiz.question: Which operator checks if two values are equal?
